user.title: zencontrol — Lumen Resources
user.description:
Connect a zencontrol Application Controller to Home Assistant.

This integration is provided by **Lumen Resources** (lumenresources.com.au).

Enter the IP address of the zencontrol controller. The TPI Advanced licence must be enabled on the controller.

confirm.title: Confirm Controller
confirm.description:
Found controller: **{label}** at {host}.

Choose how Home Assistant receives live state events from the controller.

error.cannot_connect: Unable to connect to the controller. Check the IP address and ensure the controller has the TPI Advanced licence enabled.

add_scene.title: Add Scene
add_scene.description:
Configure a scene to recall on a DALI group or short address.

Leave the name blank to auto-fetch it from the controller.

add_system_variable.title: Add System Variable
add_system_variable.description: Expose a controller system variable as a sensor. Named variables on Pro controllers are discovered automatically; use this to add unnamed variables or variables on non-Pro controllers.

remove_system_variable.title: Remove System Variable
remove_system_variable.description: Select the system variable to remove.

add_load.title: Add Load Override
add_load.description: Force a DALI short address to a specific Home Assistant entity type. By default, dimmable loads become lights and relays become switches — use this to make a load a cover (blind) or fan instead, or to force light/switch.

add_cover.title: Cover Options
add_cover.description: Configure the blind. Enable invert if the open/closed ends are the wrong way around.

add_fan.title: Fan Speeds
add_fan.description: Choose how many speeds the fan has. A default speed table is generated (evenly spaced, top speed at maximum) and can be retuned later via 'Edit fan speeds'.

edit_fan_speeds.title: Fan Speed Table
edit_fan_speeds.description: Edit the speed table as 'Name:level' entries separated by commas, e.g. 'Low:85, Medium:169, High:254'. Levels are DALI arc levels 1–254 and must ascend.

remove_load.title: Remove Load Override
remove_load.description: Select the load override to remove (the address reverts to automatic detection).

error.invalid_group: Group number must be between 0 and 15.
error.scene_exists: A scene with this target and scene number is already configured.
error.sysvar_exists: That system variable number is already configured.
error.load_exists: That short address already has an override.
error.invalid_fan_speeds: Invalid speed table. Use 'Name:level' entries, levels 1–254, ascending.

abort.no_sysvars: No system variables are currently configured.
abort.no_fans: No fan overrides are currently configured.
abort.no_loads: No load overrides are currently configured.
